title: second thoughts
content:
I'm having a bit of second thoughts here. I'm talking about the flood warning I posted the other day.

The thing is, I only read the first part which says ...

!-/gallery/misc/flood.png!

But I failed to read the second part which says ...

!-/gallery/misc/flood02.png!

If you know me well enough, this is a good enough reason for me *not to post* the warning. So, I apologize for not reading the whole thing thoroughly before posting it.

%(me)This entry has nothing to do with the fact that yesterday was a VERY DRY day.%

Have a good day!
